global.description: The ad features a prominent cashback offer with a clean logo and a clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback with a simple signup.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A circular and rectangular shape in a light orange color, providing a subtle backdrop for the text.

elements.label: Cashback offer
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller line below it in a lighter font that reads 'Fast signup, instant card'.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast signup instant card

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' displayed in a prominent position at the top, featuring a clean and modern font.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button with the text 'Order now' in white, set against a contrasting background.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the body text is centered in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
